user_query: 2024年第1季度全国科技行业的企业债券投资级收益率是多少？
question: 2024年第1季度全国科技行业的企业债券投资级收益率是多少？

question: 2021年至2023年间，全国工业企业债券违约率超过1.5%的季度有多少个？

user_query: 按年份统计全国科技行业企业信用债累计新发行量的年度趋势
question: 按年份统计全国科技行业企业信用债累计新发行量的年度趋势

question: 查询2020年至2023年间累计企业信用债新发行量超过500000亿元的行业
answer: [{"sector": "金融", "total_issuance": 858800.0}, {"sector": "通信服务", "total_issuance": 858800.0}, {"sector": "能源", "total_issuance": 858800.0}, {"sector": "科技", "total_issuance": 858800.0}, {"sector": "消费", "total_issuance": 858800.0}, {"sector": "材料", "total_issuance": 858800.0}, {"sector": "工业", "total_issuance": 858800.0}, {"sector": "地产", "total_issuance": 858800.0}, {"sector": "可选消费", "total_issuance": 858800.0}, {"sector": "医疗健康", "total_issuance": 858800.0}, {"sector": "公用事业", "total_issuance": 858800.0}]
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT sector, SUM(new_issuance_100m_cny) AS total_issuance
FROM corporate_credit
WHERE year BETWEEN 2020 AND 2023 AND geo_level = 'national'
GROUP BY sector

ORDER BY total_issuance DESC

question: 查询2023年华北、东北、华东三大区域1月份的总体CPI同比变化率

user_query: 查询全国CPI总体指数的年度平均值变化趋势（2016-2025年）

user_query: 查询2019年全国CPI环比跌幅最大的月份（环比变化率最小）
question: 查询2019年全国CPI环比跌幅最大的月份（环比变化率最小）
ground_truth_sql:

FROM cpi_inflation

user_query: 查询2023年CPI同比涨幅高于全年平均水平的月份
question: 查询2023年CPI同比涨幅高于全年平均水平的月份
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT month, yoy_change_pct
FROM cpi_inflation
WHERE year = 2023 AND geo_level = 'national'
  AND yoy_change_pct > (
    SELECT AVG(yoy_change_pct)
    FROM cpi_inflation
    WHERE year = 2023 AND geo_level = 'national'
  )
ORDER BY month

user_query: 华南地区哪些月份的总发电量超过该地区的平均发电量？

question: 各年度上证综指的平均收盘价是多少？
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT year, AVG(shanghai_comp_close) AS avg_close
FROM stock_indices
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY year

user_query: 哪些年份的市场波动率指数超过20的月份数量达到6个月以上？
question: 哪些年份的市场波动率指数超过20的月份数量达到6个月以上？
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT year, COUNT(*) AS high_volatility_months
FROM stock_indices
WHERE volatility_idx > 20
GROUP BY year
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 6
ORDER BY year

user_query: 哪些年份的北向资金年度累计净流入超过5000亿元？
question: 哪些年份的北向资金年度累计净流入超过5000亿元？
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT year, SUM(northbound_netflow_100m_cny) AS total_netflow
FROM stock_indices
GROUP BY year
HAVING SUM(northbound_netflow_100m_cny) > 5000
ORDER BY year

user_query: 2019年到2021年间，江苏省的出口同比增速在哪些月份为负增长？
question: 2019年到2021年间，江苏省的出口同比增速在哪些月份为负增长？
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT year, month, export_yoy_pct
FROM trade_balance
WHERE year BETWEEN 2019 AND 2021
  AND geo_name = '江苏'
  AND export_yoy_pct < 0
ORDER BY year, month
LIMIT 10

user_query: 2023年各省份每季度的平均出口额是多少？（季度定义：Q1=1-3月，Q2=4-6月，Q3=7-9月，Q4=10-12月）
question: 2023年各省份每季度的平均出口额是多少？（季度定义：Q1=1-3月，Q2=4-6月，Q3=7-9月，Q4=10-12月）
answer: [{"geo_name": "上海", "quarter": "Q1", "avg_exports": 12090.39}, {"geo_name": "上海", "quarter": "Q2", "avg_exports": 11881.99}, {"geo_name": "上海", "quarter": "Q3", "avg_exports": 11741.93}, {"geo_name": "上海", "quarter": "Q4", "avg_exports": 12473.72}, {"geo_name": "云南", "quarter": "Q1", "avg_exports": 7226.13}, {"geo_name": "云南", "quarter": "Q2", "avg_exports": 6971.65}, {"geo_name": "云南", "quarter": "Q3", "avg_exports": 6808.62}, {"geo_name": "云南", "quarter": "Q4", "avg_exports": 6672.56}, {"geo_name": "内蒙古", "quarter": "Q1", "avg_exports": 4848.02}, {"geo_name": "内蒙古", "quarter": "Q2", "avg_exports": 4638.86}, {"geo_name": "内蒙古", "quarter": "Q3", "avg_exports": 4638.75}, {"geo_name": "内蒙古", "quarter": "Q4", "avg_exports": 4461.11}, {"geo_name": "北京", "quarter": "Q1", "avg_exports": 12415.44}, {"geo_name": "北京", "quarter": "Q2", "avg_exports": 12368.63}, {"geo_name": "北京", "quarter": "Q3", "avg_exports": 11794.65}, {"geo_name": "北京", "quarter": "Q4", "avg_exports": 11648.97}, {"geo_name": "吉林", "quarter": "Q1", "avg_exports": 3166.1}, {"geo_name": "吉林", "quarter": "Q2", "avg_exports": 3295.06}, {"geo_name": "吉林", "quarter": "Q3", "avg_exports": 3200.44}, {"geo_name": "吉林", "quarter": "Q4", "avg_exports": 3084.47}]
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT geo_name,
       CASE
           WHEN month BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN 'Q1'
           WHEN month BETWEEN 4 AND 6 THEN 'Q2'
           WHEN month BETWEEN 7 AND 9 THEN 'Q3'
           WHEN month BETWEEN 10 AND 12 THEN 'Q4'
       END AS quarter,
       AVG(exports_musd) AS avg_exports
FROM trade_balance
WHERE year = 2023 AND geo_level = 'province'
GROUP BY geo_name, quarter
ORDER BY geo_name, quarter
LIMIT 20

user_query: 2023年全国层级中，哪些月份的出口额高于全年平均出口额？
question: 2023年全国层级中，哪些月份的出口额高于全年平均出口额？
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT month, exports_musd
FROM trade_balance
WHERE year = 2023 AND geo_level = 'national'
  AND exports_musd > (
      SELECT AVG(exports_musd)
      FROM trade_balance
      WHERE year = 2023 AND geo_level = 'national'
  )
ORDER BY month
